prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息 /通信、电气工程、计算机类等理工热门专业持续高热，与暨南大学优势学科匹配度高；福建省2026年物理类考生约203930人，较2025年增加约6.16%，考生规模扩大使竞争加剧；暨南大学位于广东广州，与福建相邻，地域偏好较强；该校在福建省招生占比约3%–5%，属跨省招生中等水平。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 8664 → 9452 → 10637 → 12629 → 14083, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5419 positions in the past 5 years and about 3446 positions in the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 14083; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province was 37 in 2021, 42 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 40 in 2024, and 42 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 47, an increase of about 11.9% compared to 2025, and the increase in enrollment places intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 59th, with recent rankings stable in the 50–60 range, indicating strong overall strength; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management topics such as dormitory security checks, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 41st, evaluated as relatively hot, with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, indicating moderate application attention; Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, with multiple disciplines having outstanding strength, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: STEM popular majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science continue to be highly sought after, matching well with Jinan University's advantageous disciplines; the number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province in 2026 is about 203,930, an increase of about 6.16% compared to 2025, and the expansion of the examinee pool intensifies competition; Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, adjacent to Fujian, with strong regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Fujian Province is about 3%–5%, which is a medium level for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the planned enrollment expansion of about 11.9% in 2026, and the increase of about 6.16% in Physics Category examinees in the province, both the expansion and the increase in examinees point to intensified competition, and the ranking is expected to continue moving backward; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 15389, with a range of 14889–15889.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1496 → 1398 → 1303 → 1921 → 1756 respectively. In recent two years, fluctuations were significant: in 2024, it dropped sharply to 1921, then slightly recovered to 1756 in 2025, showing an overall oscillating trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1756. The enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 21 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 19 in 2025. For 2026, the plan is 17, a reduction of about 10.5% compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 59th, with stable rankings in the 50–60 range in recent years, indicating strong overall strength. Its reputation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management topics such as dormitory security checks, with no significant negative public opinion. On Douyin, its popularity ranks 41st, rated as relatively hot, with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, and moderate application attention. Disciplines such as Journalism and Communication (A), Business Administration (A), Applied Economics (A-), Chinese Language and Literature (A-), Biology (A-), and Pharmacy (A-) are outstanding, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Accounting continue to be socially hot. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Fujian Province is approximately 63,970, an increase of about 6.17% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, adjacent to Fujian, with strong regional preference. Its enrollment proportion in Fujian Province is about 3%–5%, which is a moderate level for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the oscillating historical rankings, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026, the increase of about 6.17% in History Category examinees in the province, and stable reputation and popularity, the enrollment reduction tends to lower the ranking, while the increase in examinees pushes it up. The two factors offset each other, and the ranking is expected to rise slightly. The predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 1675, with a range of 1373–1977.
